lesson.subtitle: Aula 10 -- On the Phone -- Could you...? / Phone expressions
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Estephano Akihito Ishii | Aula 10 -- On the Phone

listenings.text: Hello! You called Better Tech Support. We are busy now and we cannot answer your call. Please leave a message after the beep. Say your name and your phone number, and we will call you back. You can also call again from nine in the morning to six in the evening. Thank you for your call!

This morning I want to call my friend Ana. I call one time, but the line is busy. So I wait five minutes and I call again. This time Ana answers the phone. I say hello and we talk for ten minutes. At the end, I leave a short message for her sister. I love to talk on the phone with my friends.

extra_audio.text: Estephano calls his friend. The line is busy. He waits and calls again. His friend answers the phone. They talk and say goodbye.
